_meta.description: Ground truth reference data + rule-based fact-check patterns. Add new rules to 'factCheckRules' to catch new AI mistakes. No code changes needed.

usPresident.name: Donald Trump
usPresident.note: Serving second term (47th President). Do NOT call him 'former' president.

rbiRepoRate.note: RBI cut repo rate by 25 bps in Feb 2026 MPC meeting.

gdpNominal.note: First Advance Estimate was ₹324.11 Lakh Cr. Use the latest available estimate.

perCapitaIncome.note: 'Per Capita Income' conventionally refers to NNI per capita (₹1.15L), NOT GDP per capita (₹2.36L).

factCheckRules.issue: Trump called 'former president' — he is the incumbent 47th President (2nd term since Jan 2025)
factCheckRules.correction: US President Trump / President Donald Trump

factCheckRules.issue: Trump called 'former president' — he is the incumbent 47th President
False claim: 'India was first to ratify the Paris Agreement' — India was the 62nd country (Oct 2, 2016)
factCheckRules.correction: India ratified the Paris Agreement on October 2, 2016, becoming the 62nd country to do so.

autoFix.replacement: India ratified the Paris Agreement on October 2, 2016 (Gandhi Jayanti), becoming the 62nd nation to do so, reinforcing its commitment to global climate action.

autoFix2.replacement: India ratified the Paris Agreement on October 2, 2016, becoming the 62nd nation to do so.

factCheckRules.issue: False claim: 'India was among the first to sign/ratify the Paris Agreement' — India signed on April 22, 2016 and ratified on October 2, 2016 (62nd country)
factCheckRules.correction: India signed the Paris Agreement on April 22, 2016 and ratified it on October 2, 2016 as the 62nd country.

factCheckRules.issue: Outdated Repo Rate: 6.50% mentioned — current rate is 6.00% (as of Feb 2026)
Old NDC target (45% by 2030) used without mentioning the updated target (47% by 2035)
Old NDC target (45%) in Quick Bytes — should be 47% by 2035
NALSA called 'first legal recognition' — should say 'first Supreme Court recognition' (TN had Transgender Welfare Board since 2008)
factCheckRules.correction: first Supreme Court recognition of transgender identity at the national level

autoFix.replacement: first Supreme Court recognition of transgender identity at the national level

factCheckRules.issue: GDP labelled as 'Advance Estimate' — Provisional Estimates for FY2024-25 are available since May 2025
Inconsistent amendment numbers across Finance Bill articles — may need editorial context

commonMistakes: Do NOT call Donald Trump 'former US President' — he is the incumbent (47th President, second term since Jan 2025)
Do NOT say India was the first to ratify the Paris Agreement — India was the 62nd country
Do NOT use 6.50% as repo rate — it has been cut multiple times since Dec 2024
Do NOT label GDP growth as 'Advance Estimate' — Provisional Estimates are available
Do NOT conflate 'per capita income' with 'GDP per capita' — they are different measures
Do NOT use old NDC target (45% by 2030) when the updated NDC (47% by 2035) has been announced
Do NOT say NALSA was 'first legal recognition of transgender identity' — say 'first Supreme Court recognition'
